title: Senior Doctor - Becton Dickinson India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Becton Dickinson India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Becton Dickinson India in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Becton Dickinson India:
Becton Dickinson India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Becton Dickinson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
